meta.title: Zeno · See where you are. Navigate where you could go.
meta.description: Zeno maps your skills into a living career constellation — revealing your strengths, your gaps, and the most effective path to your target role.

common.sessionExpired: This assessment session has expired. Let's start a fresh one.
common.backendDown: Couldn't reach the backend. Make sure the API is running.

home.title: See how close you already are to AI Engineering
home.subtitle: Your existing engineering skills may already transfer to AI applications.
home.resume: Your last exploration is unfinished — pick up where you left off

graph.legendHint: click a node to trace the path
graph.intro: Based on your role, I found 5 engineering foundations that may already transfer to AI. Tap the ones you've done.
graph.confirmed: {count} foundations confirmed — your path to AI Engineering is taking shape.
graph.answered: {count}/{max} transfer anchors answered. Each one needs an explicit answer.
graph.source: From patterns in 759 frontend engineering jobs
graph.checkPrompt: Zippi thinks you may already have this. Let's check.
graph.correctionHint: Choose the closest evidence. Correction does not add points by itself; the experience still determines the level.
graph.correctionInputTitle: Correct this estimate with real experience
graph.correctionInputHint: Name the project, what you owned, the problem you solved, and what you ultimately delivered.
graph.correctionPlaceholder: Example: In Zeno, I independently integrated the 0G Router, handled streaming responses, timeout retries, and TEE verification display, then shipped a runnable demo.
graph.correctionProgress: Understanding your experience and grounding the evidence…
graph.correctionPrivacy: The LLM only extracts structured evidence. Zeno rules compute the level, and nothing changes until you confirm.
graph.correctionReviewHint: This evidence was extracted from your original text and is used by the level rubric.
graph.correctionBoundary1: This only shows familiarity or description so far, without a clear implementation or delivery action. Add what you actually built to calibrate it further.
graph.correctionBoundary2: This proves you applied the skill, so it is not mere familiarity. L3 requires evidence of independent ownership in a real project.
graph.correctionBoundary3: This proves independent ownership of a defined scope in a real project. L4 additionally requires system-level leadership, trade-offs, evaluation, or ongoing governance.
graph.correctionBoundary4: This includes both independent delivery and system-level leadership evidence, meeting the highest level in the current rule.
graph.correctionAnalyzeFailed: Could not analyze this experience. Please retry.
graph.correctionConfirmFailed: Could not save the correction. Please retry.
graph.correctionEvidence2: Built it end to end in a personal feature or demo
graph.correctionEvidence3: Independently shipped it and solved problems in a real project
graph.correctionEvidence4: Led architecture, trade-offs, or continuous improvement
graph.sourceBackend: From patterns in 595 backend engineering jobs
graph.sourceFullstack: From patterns in 403 full-stack engineering jobs

skills.title: Confirm your starting point
skills.subtitle: We identified your transferable skills and flagged what needs assessment. Confirm or adjust, then generate your roadmap.
skills.transferHint: Based on your current role, these skills are probably transferable. Tap to adjust.
skills.assessHint: These are core thresholds for AI application development. Please confirm your actual level.
skills.capsuleHint: Select the scenarios you've delivered at work — we'll infer your AI migration starting point. Not sure? Skip it, totally fine.
skills.confirmHint: Based on your experience, we inferred your starting point. Below are the most critical AI application skills — please confirm or adjust.
skills.pickAtLeastOne: · pick at least 1 to generate a path

growth.title: AI Growth Path
growth.subtitle: You're not starting from zero — you're translating engineering judgment into AI-native work.
growth.back: ← See why this path fits me

result.firstLoadHint: The first run also builds your roadmap and matches resources, so it may take a little longer.
result.title: Your AI transition map
result.honestNote: Zeno won't promise you a job. We do one thing: use real hiring data to honestly tell you where the gaps are — and which ones are real.
result.generatedFrom: From your {count}-skill profile, calibrated against real job postings
result.headerSummary: You already have transferable foundations. Now let's see what to unlock next.
result.section1Subtitle: Your experience has already brought you here
result.section1Empty: No clear strengths surfaced this round — adding more of your existing experience will sharpen the result.
result.expandUsage: How it applies in AI engineering
result.evidenceLabel: This is inferred from your experiences and can be refined.
result.shareTagline: Mapped by Zeno · calibrated on 1,810 real job signals
result.heroIdentity: Your engineering foundation is ready. Close “{skill}” next.
result.heroIdentityComplete: You now cover every required skill in this target profile
result.heroProjected: Projected {coverage}% after this path · about {weeks} weeks
result.heroProjection: At {hours} hours per week, this path takes about {weeks} weeks. After every acceptance check passes, your confirmed coverage floor is projected to rise from {current}% to {projected}%.
result.heroBoundary: A conditional estimate after completing and verifying the tasks—not an employment success rate.
result.zgVerifiedTip: Generated on 0G Compute; the Router synchronously verified the TEE signature. Audit it with the Request ID and provider address
result.coverageNote: Unassessed skills receive no credit; this is not diagnostic accuracy or an employment success rate
result.profileConfidenceTip: The number of required target-role skills for which Zeno has evidence, including your confirmed experience and transferable foundations from your current role. It describes diagnostic coverage, not accuracy.
result.termBacking: Computed against <u>{count} real job requirements</u> — not what you'd like to hear.
result.skillTreeSubtitle: Your existing skills light up what comes next. The gold node is where your time has the most leverage now.
result.skillHowTransfers: How it transfers to AI engineering
result.skillTransferFallback: This engineering experience transfers directly to reliable AI product delivery.
result.skillCurrentTarget: You are at L{current}; the target role requires L{target}.
result.spineHowBody: You already know how to build reliable systems — AI engineering reuses the same judgment to make models reliable. You're translating engineering strength into AI-native work.
result.journeyS1Note: Your engineering background is already the hardest part to build.
result.journeyS2Head: This is how AI capability grows.
result.journeyS2Note: Each step builds on the one before it.
result.journeyS3Sub: It sets the rules for everything that follows.
result.journeyS3Note: Without structure, the rest doesn't hold.
result.journeyS4Note: This is the first step that unlocks the next ones.
result.section2Empty: You already cover most of the required skills for the target role — keep consolidating.
result.priorityGapsSubtitle: This explains the ranking; the roadmap below owns the actual work
result.otherGapsCount: {count} more gaps are outside the current path · View all
result.portfolioSubtitle: Your existing skills are AI-era assets. Zeno allocates your limited time by leverage — like managing a portfolio.
result.section3Subtitle: Ordered by skill dependencies and role importance, starting with your current task
result.doneHint: Record completion after meeting the criteria; progress is saved on this device
result.calibrateTitle: Calibrate the roadmap to your time budget
result.calibrateDefault: Pick your weekly hours and the roadmap re-sequences instantly.
result.resourcesEmpty: No resources have passed the freshness check yet — they'll appear here automatically once the library is topped up.
result.resourcesTitle: Recommended resources (passed the link freshness check)
result.recommendResourceHint: Submissions are checked for availability, relevance, and freshness before entering the recommendation library.
result.recommendResourceReason: Why do you recommend it, and who is it for? (required)
result.recommendResourceSuccess: Added to the review queue. Thanks for contributing.
result.recommendResourceError: Submission failed. Check the URL and try again.
result.targetSubtitle: By default we assess you against a general AI Engineer profile. Got a job posting in mind? Paste its description below — we'll figure out what that role actually emphasizes and re-score your gaps and roadmap accordingly. Nothing is locked in; clear it anytime.
result.targetPlaceholder: Paste the job description here — responsibilities, requirements, tech stack…
result.targetEmpty: Paste a job description first, then we'll tailor your gaps to it.
result.targetMatchedHint: Zeno will only re-score your roadmap after you confirm this direction.
result.targetNeedsConfirmation: This role spans several directions. Check the quoted evidence before confirming.
result.targetApply: Confirm and re-score for this direction
result.targetNoMatch: No strong specialty stood out in this description — keeping the general assessment, which already fits.
